SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-21-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONSTANCE, RODERICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KANAAN, RAMSEY DBA PM PRESS $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $385.00, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE USE OF THE IMAGES AND THE CATALOG COVER IS A USE BEYOND THE ORIGINAL LICENSE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-21-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-21-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE NOT REPORTED. (506)
